note: This may be part of a Latin Apocalypse which K. Weitzmann (who may have seen it whilst photographing the contents of Chest 2 in the monastery of St Catherine's) informed B. Bischoff of, but which Bischoff does not appear to have seen. Alternatively, this may be a second Latin Apocalypse from Sinai

Brown, Michelle P. "The Bridge in the Desert: towards establishing an historical context for the newly discovered Latin manuscripts of St Catherine’s Sinai." Rivista degli Studi Orientali 90 (Suppl. 1, 2017): 73-98

Boudalis, Georgios, and Giulia Rossetto. "Colour Mapping of Sin. ar. NF 8 + Sin. ar. NF 28." In M. P. Brown and J. Lockhart, eds. The Apollonius of Tyre Fragment in Arabic NF 8: Studies of a Latin Palimpsest at St Catherine’s Monastery, Sinai. [Forthcoming]

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.

cataloguer.message: Description and identification of undertexts as part of SPP (2011-2016). Migrated to SMDL in 2025. Identification of text by Michelle Brown and Daniela Mairhofer.
